description_long: This is a single-story school building with a modern, open layout featuring multiple classrooms, communal spaces, and outdoor courtyards. The structure is primarily constructed from light brown brick with large windows and colorful accent panels along one facade. The interior spaces are visible, showing tables, chairs, and educational displays, while the exterior includes green courtyards with outdoor seating. The building is surrounded by a low concrete wall, and there are several entry points and open walkways connecting the different sections. The roofline is flat, and the design emphasizes accessibility and natural light. Colorful signage and educational posters are visible on the interior walls, enhancing the learning environment.
description: A modern, single-story school building with brick walls, colorful accents, open courtyards, and visible classroom furnishings. The design features large windows, flat roofs, and accessible outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side of the school, showing green courtyards, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of classrooms with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, featuring colorful accent panels, the main entrance, and a clear view of the building's open layout and outdoor areas.
description_view_2: This angle shows the opposite side, with more green space, additional entry points, and a clear view of the building's interconnected sections.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the back and central courtyard, with visible classroom interiors, outdoor tables, and a playground area.
